SILVER 7 CAREERS
THIS IS NO
ORDINARY JOB
JOIN THE SILVER 7 TEAM
LEAD BY EXAMPLE

Our team is known for going beyond the call of duty, surpassing expectations to provide our members and community outstanding service. We work to make martial arts and physical education an intensely fun experience for people of all age groups, fitness levels, and ability by using creative coaching techniques to develop every athlete’s potential. Silver 7 is fun, rewarding, diverse, and challenging all at the same time!

FUN EXPERIENCE
EXCEPTIONAL ENVIROMENT
COMPETITIVE SALARIES
EXCELLENT BENEFITS
WE ARE HIRING!
PART TIME & FULL TIME COACHES

Our coaches provide a family-oriented atmosphere that welcomes everyone with the desire to get in shape, learn martial arts, and become part of our extended community. Coaches are cornerstone members of the community, admired and recognized for their integrity, professionalism, maturity, and positive energy. Our coaches uphold these values and use them to make our world a better place, making a difference in the lives of our members.

JOB REQUIREMENTS
Passion and Dedication
Patience and Understanding
Energy and Enthusiasm
Creativity and Imagination
A Love for Martial Arts, Fitness, Sport
A Commitment to students and their well being

GET STARTED ON YOUR PATH TO ACHIEVING PHYSICAL GREATNESS NOW!
